summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-ROUTE-012, VAL-ROUTE-013, VAL-ROUTE-014, VAL-ROUTE-017) via 9 unit tests in grounded-search.test.ts. All 184 tests in the full test suite passed (0 failures).
